issues.currents_timeout: Currents API times out >30s from both local and Supabase edge runtime. Disabled. CURRENTS_KEY is set in secrets — retest in future sprint.
issues.newsapi_426: NewsAPI /v2/everything returns HTTP 426 on free dev plan. Resolved by switching to /v2/top-headlines?country=us&category=health.
issues.gnews_search_delay: GNews /search endpoint returns 0 on free plan (12hr real-time delay). Resolved by switching to /top-headlines?topic=health.
issues.signal_type_enum: FIXED — CATEGORY_SIGNAL_TYPE was mapping to invalid enum values (industry_news, press_release, etc.). Updated to use valid signal_type_enum values (treatment_trend, brand_adoption, regulatory_alert, etc.).
